titles.title: I Am the God That Healeth Thee

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: I am the God that healeth thee. I am the Lord, Your healer. I sent My word and healed your disease. I am the Lord, Your Healer.

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: You are the God that healeth me You are the Lord, my Healer You sent Your word and You healed my disease You are the Lord, My Healer
